---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior, a crash, or a false positive/negative
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce, including the exact command you ran:

```bash
rust-doctor ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual output

Paste the relevant output (use `--json` if a structured diagnostic helps).

```
<output here>
```

## Environment

- rust-doctor version: <!-- `rust-doctor --version` -->
- Install method: <!-- cargo install / npx / binstall / shell script / GitHub Action -->
- OS & arch: <!-- e.g. Fedora 43 x86_64, macOS 14 arm64, Windows 11 x64 -->
- Rust toolchain: <!-- `rustc --version` -->

## Additional context

A minimal project or snippet that triggers the bug is the fastest path to a fix.
